dnb.note: FC estimate shows only patient_payable. DNB items (patient ₹0) are hidden from FC; billing_disposition + four_value are metadata for the insurer/audit view.

expected_nme.basis: HIMS NME history · Non-GIPSA Insurance · Open Bill · PULMONOLOGY · LOS 3-5 · ICU 0 (n=79)

calculable_fields.basis: governed PF (visits by setting: 1 ward / 2 ICU per day)

notes: Medical management is a family × setting menu — not one generic estimate.
Room + PF (+ drug-admin for cash) are auto-calculated; pharmacy/investigations are historical ranges or manual.
Ranged policy estimate — confidence flags shown; not production-certified.
Doctor-written high-value items are structured, confirm-before-add inputs; FC counselling remarks are not the indication.

tax.note: GST is a separate line, additive to the base estimate (not folded into the parity-pinned total).
